disallowed_proof: untagged flaky or low-signal suites promoted into blockers without classification
selected_lane_contract.goal: Add slower but still stable integration proof after merge, rather than pushing all of it into every local or PR loop.
prove: The mainline gate-core lane passes critical, concurrency, and reconciliation truthsuite proof with hard guards.
Module-coverage and contract guards stay green for touched high-risk areas.
Integration confidence is stronger than PR confidence but still not a substitute for staging deployability evidence.
